root_cause: S3 bucket policy changed, blocking Lambda function access
error_message: AccessDenied: Access Denied to S3 bucket reports-archive
evidence: Lambda attempting to write to s3://reports-archive/
S3 bucket policy updated 30 minutes ago
New policy missing Lambda execution role ARN
Previous writes successful before policy change
resolution: Updated S3 bucket policy to include Lambda execution role
preventive_measures: Test policy changes in staging before production
Add CloudWatch alarm for S3 access denied errors
Document all services requiring bucket access
Implement policy validation in CI/CD pipeline
